verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our Father above, giver of all life The mighty maker, savior forever He will make a way when things start to turn gray I'll hold onto Him every single day My heart's desire to be forever in His arms

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll forever trust in Him Even when the things start to dim For He is the one who holds tomorrow This World will fall apart But His Word will always be an art Of His wonderful works in my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every sorrow and pain, rain after the rain Has a purpose for us to gain Filled with His love With promise from above
